calendar.matters:
Notice Of Hearing On Verified Petition For Order Compelling Arbitration
Off Calendar Apr-11-2007 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: PETITIONER PAUL ARMSTRONG'S Petition For Order Compelling Arbitration is granted. Request for interim award of fees is denied. Prevailing party to prepare a form of order. (301/PJB/xJM) Judge: Peter J. Busch, Reporter: Carol Karen, CSR #8189
